debug_info.goal:
U : Type
h : ctble U
A : Set U
⊢ ctble ↑A

proof:
by
  rw [Theorem_8_1_5_3_type] at h ⊢
  obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := h
  use (fun x => f x)
  intros x y hxy
  apply Subtype.ext
  apply hf
  exact hxy
